business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors.

coverages_discussed.notes: Prior insurance history shown for 2024 with 10 open claims and no cancellations. Prior carriers also include Hartford Financial Services for 2023 with 13 open claims and Auto-Owners Insurance for 2022 with 12 open claims; no cancellations indicated.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history lists open claims by year: 2024 Hanover Insurance Group — 10 open claims, no cancellations; 2023 Hartford Financial Services — 13 open claims, no cancellations; 2022 Auto-Owners Insurance — 12 open claims, no cancellations.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles: Yes. Most recent CSA BASIC score in Vehicle Maintenance: below intervention threshold. Most recent CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator: above intervention threshold, currently being addressed. MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually: Yes. Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations: Yes. CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire: Yes.

fleet_summary.radius_of_operation: Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors; interstate (FMCSA) only

concerns: Most recent CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator is above intervention threshold and currently being addressed.
Prior insurance history shows open claims in each listed year: 10 in 2024, 13 in 2023, and 12 in 2022.
Hired auto / non-owned auto exposure indicated for employees driving personal vehicles for company business.
Sleeper-cab tractor units used for long-haul operations.
Some vehicles include refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance table shows open claims but no cancellations: 10 open claims in 2024, 13 in 2023, and 12 in 2022.
positives: GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles.
Drivers are in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations.
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually.
Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained.
CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire.
